title: Inventory drowning risk and water-body data
outcome: Dated source inventory separating water-body maps, mortality data, childcare data, and unusable sources.

title: Map water-body proximity at neighborhood scale
outcome: Water-body proximity map including small ponds and ditches.
validation_method: Replicator validates water-body detection accuracy against ground truth.
done_condition: Water map includes small water-body detection and accuracy assessment with replication.

title: Map child drowning risk at sub-national scale
outcome: Risk map combining water proximity, childcare access, and population.
done_condition: Risk map with methodology and replication.

title: Red-team misuse of drowning risk data
Check whether outputs match drowning prevention needs
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies decision, user, misuse risk, replicated.
